::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">7</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/adma.202503143" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">A Disordered Rock Salt Anode for Long-Lived All-Vanadium Sodium-Ion Battery</span>

H. Lin, Z. Wang, O. Solares, S. Huber, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, S. Danitz, W.-T. Peng, K. Zhou, P.-C. Lee, H. Liu, Z. Hui, R. Liu, M. Liu, W. Tang, J. Wu, Z. Chen, K. W. Chapman, S. P. Ong, and P. Liu

*Adv. Mater.* **2025**, *37*, *46*, 2503143. DOI: 10.1002/adma.202503143
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](06_2025_VRS2/VRS2_TOC.jpg)
:::

:::
